expression: Top''/Bottom Board: {([Width]) - 2 * ([BoardThick])} x {([Depth])-([BackBoardThick])} x {[BoardThick]} x 2pcs & Side Board: {([Height])} x {([Depth])-([BackBoardThick])} x {[BoardThick]} x 2pcs & Back Board: {([Width])} x {([Height])} x {([BackBoardThick])} x 1pcs
author: sheenhoong

remarks.zh: 计算橱柜的板材尺寸。[Width], [Height], [Depth] 是总尺寸，[BoardThick] 是顶部、底部和侧板的厚度，[BackBoardThick] 是后板的厚度。(AI translated, please check)
remarks.en: Calculates board sizes for a cabinet. [Width], [Height], [Depth] is total Measurement, [BoardThick] is Top, Bottom and Side Board material thickness, [BackBoardThick] is Background Board material thickness.
remarks.ms: Mengira saiz papan untuk kabinet. [Width], [Height], [Depth] adalah ukuran keseluruhan, [BoardThick] adalah ketebalan bahan papan Atas, Bawah dan Tepi, [BackBoardThick] adalah ketebalan bahan papan Latar. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.id: Menghitung ukuran papan untuk kabinet. [Width], [Height], [Depth] adalah ukuran total, [BoardThick] adalah ketebalan bahan papan Atas, Bawah, dan Samping, [BackBoardThick] adalah ketebalan bahan papan Belakang. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.th: คำนวณขนาดบอร์ดสำหรับตู้ [Width], [Height], [Depth] เป็นขนาดทั้งหมด, [BoardThick] คือความหนาของวัสดุบอร์ดด้านบน ด้านล่าง และด้านข้าง, [BackBoardThick] คือความหนาของวัสดุบอร์ดด้านหลัง (AI translated, please check)
remarks.vi: Tính kích thước bảng cho tủ. [Width], [Height], [Depth] là kích thước tổng, [BoardThick] là độ dày vật liệu của bảng Trên, Dưới và Bên, [BackBoardThick] là độ dày vật liệu của bảng Nền. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.tl: Kinakalkula ang mga laki ng kahoy para sa kabinet. Ang [Width], [Height], [Depth] ay ang kabuuang Sukat, ang [BoardThick] ay ang kapal ng materyal ng Taas, Ibaba at Gilid ng Kahoy, at ang [BackBoardThick] ay ang kapal ng materyal ng Likod na Kahoy. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.my: မီးဖိုသို့အိမ်တိုက်ပိုင်းများအတွက်ဘုတ်အကြောင်းအားတွက်ချက်သည် [Width], [Height], [Depth] သည်ခြုံ၍စာရင်းရှင်းပါတယ် [BoardThick] သည် ပစ္စည်းနံပါတ်နဲ့အတူပါ...မှသားနားပစ် သံပလွဲ [BackBoardThick] သန့်ရှင်းရေးပေါ်တဲ့ရည်ရွယ်ချက်နဲ့တဲ့တိုးက…(AI translated, please check)
remarks.km: គណនាដុំឈើសំរាប់ទូ។ [Width], [Height], [Depth] គឺជាអាវុធសរុប, [BoardThick] គឺជាកម្រិតនៃទំហំវត្ថុធាតុដើមលើត្រង់និងខាងក្រោម, [BackBoardThick] គឺជាកម្រិតនៃទំហំវត្ថុធាតុដើមផ្នែកខាងក្រោយ។ (AI translated, please check)
remarks.lo: ຄິດໄລ່ຂະ ໜາດໃຫ້ທຳມະທຽບໃນຄວາມຄິດຂວ ຂອງທົງເຉືອຂູ່...ນສາມາດ! [Width],[Height]ກະເອົາຫານຄືຂອງຑາລາ(T)(AI translated...)
remarks.ja: キャビネットの板サイズを計算します。 [Width], [Height], [Depth] は全体の寸法、[BoardThick] は天板、底板、側板の材料の厚さ、[BackBoardThick] は背板の材料の厚さです。(AI translated, please check)
remarks.ko: 캐비닛의 판 크기를 계산합니다. [Width], [Height], [Depth]는 총 치수, [BoardThick]는 상판, 하판 및 측판 재료 두께, [BackBoardThick]는 배경판의 재료 두께입니다. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.es: Calcula los tamaños de las tablas para un gabinete. [Width], [Height], [Depth] es la Medición total, [BoardThick] es el grosor del material de la parte superior, inferior y lateral, [BackBoardThick] es el grosor del material de la tabla trasera. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.fr: Calcule les dimensions des planches pour un meuble. [Width], [Height], [Depth] est la mesure totale, [BoardThick] est l'épaisseur du matériau des planches supérieure, inférieure et latérales, [BackBoardThick] est l'épaisseur du matériau de la planche arrière. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.de: Berechnet die Plattengrößen für einen Schrank. [Width], [Height], [Depth] sind die Gesamtmaße, [BoardThick] ist die Materialstärke von Ober-, Unter- und Seitenplatte, [BackBoardThick] ist die Materialstärke der Rückwandplatte. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.hi: एक कैबिनेट के लिए बोर्ड के आकार की गणना करता है। [Width], [Height], [Depth] कुल माप है, [BoardThick] शीर्ष, नीचे और साइड बोर्ड सामग्री की मोटाई है, [BackBoardThick] पृष्ठभूमि बोर्ड सामग्री की मोटाई है। (AI translated, please check)
remarks.ru: Вычисляет размеры досок для шкафа. [Width], [Height], [Depth] - это общие размеры, [BoardThick] - толщина материала для верхней, нижней и боковой панели, а [BackBoardThick] - толщина материала для задней панели. (AI translated, please check)
